judge_result.short_rationale: Core required actions are present in the correct order: remove from contaminated area, keep at rest, and seek care if symptoms develop or persist. However, the added line urging immediate medical attention unconditionally conflicts with the source’s conditional escalation, so correctness and grounding are reduced.
